subject: Update logging to show Vehicle ID (Ori) and Draw ID
description: Update all vehicle-related logging statements in _detect_dumping_kritis_v4.py to show both original vehicle ID and display ID (draw_id) which is calculated as id % modulo. This includes blocking, violation, area entry/exit, and out-of-frame logs.
activeForm: Updating logging statements to show both Vehicle ID (Ori) and Draw ID
